analysis.reasoning: Core message: China is an ancient, independently developed civilization that has coexisted harmoniously with other civilizations and religions; China is peaceful and a great civilization. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; the tweet does not mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – partially aligned: it frames China as peaceful and coexisting harmoniously with other civilizations/religions, which supports the image of a cooperative, non-threatening actor, though it does not reference international law or multilateralism explicitly. CH3 (epic history) – aligned: it emphasizes 5,000 years of independent development and great civilization, highlighting historical depth and resilience (without the adversity angle, but still within the “epic history” framing). CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – not present; no mention of political system or domestic governance values. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – not present; no reference to government performance or development achievements. CH6 (interesting culture/heritage) – partially relevant but the thrust is civilizational-historical rather than cultural tourism; however, the focus is more on civilizational history than showcasing culture/nature/heritage sites, so CH6 is not the best fit. Conclusion: CH2 and CH3 are promoted.
